clusters.justification: This cluster maps onto sympathetic, insular, and amygdalar co-activations, representing the broad functional axis of processing internal physiological states, arousal, and emotional valence.

Reflecting co-activations across the striatum and ventromedial prefrontal cortex, this axis binds processes involved in computing incentive salience, reward outcomes, and goal-directed decision making.

Anchored in the default mode network's cortical midline and temporoparietal structures, this domain represents the macroscopic capacity to construct and process internally generated representations regarding the self and others.
